title: My Addresses (CAR)
manageYourAddresses: Manage your citizen addresses and verifications
primaryAddressDescription: Your primary address is your main residence. You can only have one primary address at a time.
secondaryAddressDescription: Secondary addresses can include work locations, temporary residences, or other relevant locations.
retirePrimaryDescription: This will remove your primary address. You can set a new primary address at any time.
removeSecondaryDescription: This will remove this secondary address from your profile. This action cannot be undone.
noPrimaryAddressMessage: You haven't set a primary address yet. Your primary address is your main residence.
noSecondaryAddressesMessage: No secondary addresses registered. Add work locations, temporary residences, or other relevant addresses.
noAddressHistoryMessage: No address history available yet. Historical addresses will appear here when you update or retire addresses.
searchByAddress: Search by address, UAC code, or landmark...
tryDifferentSearch: Try searching with a different term or UAC code
scopeDescription: Choose whether you're registering for the entire building or a specific unit within it.
secondaryScopeDescription: Choose whether this secondary address covers the entire building or a specific unit.
uacDescription: Enter the official UAC for this address. This should be provided by the National Address Registry.
secondaryUacDescription: Enter the official UAC for this secondary address.
unitUacDescription: Enter the UAC for the specific unit within the building.
effectiveFromDescription: Date when this address becomes your primary residence.
setPrimaryAddressForVerification: Set your primary address in the Citizen Address Repository before requesting verification.
addSecondaryAddressForVerification: Add a secondary address in the Citizen Address Repository before requesting verification.
verifyOwnershipDescription: Submit legal documents to verify your ownership or residency for this address.
addressVerificationDescription: First set your address in the Citizen Address Repository, then request verification.
needAddressForVerification: You need to set at least one address in the Citizen Address Repository before requesting verification.
actionRequiredDescription: Please review the notes above and update your verification request with the requested changes.
